summary: Mobile Dashboard API Testing Complete - All 17 backend tests passed. All API endpoints required by the mobile app dashboards (CEO, Manager, Owner) and operational modules (TAP, Table, KDS, Rewards) are working correctly and returning the expected data structures.

auth_login_ceo.details: CEO login with garcia.rapha2@gmail.com / 12345 returns access_token and user object

ceo_health.details: Returns kpis object with mrr, active_companies, active_venues, growth_pct

ceo_revenue.details: Returns chart array with revenue, profit, fees data points

ceo_pipeline.details: Returns pipeline object with leads, paid, activated, active, at_risk, cancelled

ceo_users.details: Returns users array with id, email, status, roles

manager_overview.details: Returns kpis (revenue_today, revenue_week, open_tabs, avg_ticket), charts, alerts

manager_staff.details: Returns staff array and barmen array

manager_reports_sales.details: Returns period, by_item array, by_method array

owner_dashboard_business.details: Returns kpis with revenue_mtd, venues array

owner_finance.details: Returns revenue_month, payments array, voids_summary object, risk_score

table_tables.details: Returns tables array with id, table_number, status, capacity

kds_tickets.details: Returns tickets array with id, status, destination, items

tap_sessions_open.details: Returns sessions array for open tabs

tap_catalog.details: Returns items array with id, name, price, category

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing demo data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile Dashboard API testing complete. All 17 endpoints tested and working. The mobile app (React Native/Expo in /app/mobile/) consumes these APIs via the services in /app/mobile/src/services/. Response format is {success: true, data: {...}, error: null} wrapped by StandardResponseMiddleware. All APIs require Bearer token authentication. CEO role required for /api/ceo/* endpoints.
